title: tephrosia roseana
intro: Tephrosia roseana, also known as the rose acacia or rose pea, is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and other infections. The health benefits of Tephrosia roseana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia roseana include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
